summary: HTS Notifications Feature Testing - All tests passed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All notification features verified working including WebSocket status indicator, Live Events feed, and toast notifications.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing tokens and performed transfer operation during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: HTS Notifications fully tested. All three notification types (Token Minted, Token Transfer, Tokens Burned) are being created with type='hts' and link='/tokenized-escrow'. WebSocket real-time events working - Live Events feed appears after operations. Toast notifications display on mint/transfer/burn. Notifications endpoint requires trailing slash: /api/notifications/

hts_notification_structure.test_hts_notifications_have_correct_type: PASS - All HTS notifications have type='hts'
hts_notification_structure.test_hts_notifications_have_correct_link: PASS - All HTS notifications have link='/tokenized-escrow'
hts_notification_structure.test_notification_metadata_contains_escr: PASS - Metadata includes escrow_id, token_id, token_symbol
hts_notification_structure.test_notification_structure: PASS - Has id, user_id, title, message, type, read, created_at

hts_notification_titles.test_mint_notification_title: PASS - Mint notifications have title='Token Minted'
hts_notification_titles.test_transfer_notification_title: PASS - Transfer notifications have title='Token Transfer'
hts_notification_titles.test_burn_notification_title: PASS - Burn notifications have title='Tokens Burned'

notification_creation.test_burn_notification_exists: PASS - Burn notifications exist from previous operations

notification_service_integration.test_all_hts_notification_types_present: PASS - All three types present: Token Minted, Token Transfer, Tokens Burned
notification_service_integration.test_hts_notifications_ordered_by_create: PASS - Notifications ordered by created_at descending

tokenized_escrow_page.token_detail: PASS - data-testid='token-detail' shows when token selected

websocket_features.ws_connection_indicator: PASS - Shows 'Live' badge in header when WebSocket connected
websocket_features.live_events_feed: PASS - data-testid='live-events-feed' appears after WebSocket events
websocket_features.live_events_content: PASS - Shows TRANSFER/MINT/BURN events with message and timestamp

toast_notifications.transfer_toast: PASS - 'Transfer Complete' toast appears after transfer operation
toast_notifications.toast_content: PASS - Shows '1 tokens transferred to seller'

auto_refresh.token_list_refresh: PASS - Token list auto-refreshes when WebSocket events arrive
auto_refresh.token_detail_refresh: PASS - Selected token detail updates (supply changed from 795 to 794)
auto_refresh.operations_history_refresh: PASS - Operations history updates with new transfer

features_verified.backend_mint_notification: PASS - POST /api/hts/tokenize creates notification with type='hts', title='Token Minted', link='/tokenized-escrow'
features_verified.backend_transfer_notification: PASS - POST /api/hts/transfer creates notification with type='hts', title='Token Transfer', link='/tokenized-escrow'
features_verified.backend_burn_notification: PASS - POST /api/hts/burn/{escrow_id} creates notification with type='hts', title='Tokens Burned', link='/tokenized-escrow'
features_verified.backend_notifications_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/notifications/ returns HTS notifications (trailing slash required)
features_verified.frontend_ws_status_indicator: PASS - /tokenized-escrow shows Live/Offline badge based on WebSocket connection
features_verified.frontend_live_events_feed: PASS - Live Events section appears after WebSocket events with MINT/TRANSFER/BURN labels
features_verified.frontend_auto_refresh: PASS - Token list and detail auto-refresh when WebSocket events arrive
features_verified.frontend_toast_notifications: PASS - Toast notifications appear on mint/transfer/burn events

mocked_apis.note: All notification functionality is real - notifications are persisted in MongoDB and broadcast via WebSocket
